claimText: Tsinghua University's Guiding Principles call for identifying and mitigating algorithmic bias and the digital divide to ensure technology serves the public good (fairness and inclusiveness principle).
evidenceSnippetOriginal: 「公平包容」原则呼吁主动识别并努力降低算法偏见与数字鸿沟，推动技术向善。

citation.citationTitle: 【深改进行时】《清华大学人工智能教育应用指导原则》发布
